patternGroups.label: previous review reference
patternGroups.description: References to previous reviews anchor the reviewer toward confirming past conclusions rather than fresh evaluation

patternGroups.label: known issue reference
patternGroups.description: References to known issues anchor the reviewer toward validating specific problems rather than conducting independent analysis

patternGroups.label: fix reference
patternGroups.description: References to fixes anchor the reviewer toward validating changes rather than independently assessing current state

patternGroups.label: expected outcome
patternGroups.description: Expected outcomes anchor the reviewer toward confirming predictions rather than independent judgment

patternGroups.label: focus direction
patternGroups.description: Directing reviewer focus violates zero-context principle; reviewer must determine what to examine

patternGroups.label: suspicion sharing
patternGroups.description: Sharing suspicions anchors the reviewer toward investigating specific areas rather than independent analysis

patternGroups.label: version reference
patternGroups.description: Version references (v1, v2) anchor the reviewer toward comparative analysis rather than independent review of current state

patternGroups.label: priority label
patternGroups.description: Priority labels from previous reviews anchor the reviewer toward validating existing assessments

patternGroups.label: revision language
patternGroups.description: References to revisions anchor the reviewer toward comparative analysis rather than fresh evaluation

patternGroups.label: authority reference
patternGroups.description: Authority endorsements create psychological pressure toward PASS verdict rather than independent judgment

patternGroups.label: timeline pressure
patternGroups.description: Timeline pressure creates urgency bias that compromises thorough independent review

patternGroups.label: baseline anchoring
patternGroups.description: Baseline metrics anchor reviewer to existing levels rather than absolute standards

patternGroups.label: negative space direction
patternGroups.description: Negative direction implicitly guides reviewer attention and violates zero-context principle

patternGroups.label: constraint framing
patternGroups.description: Constraint framing may be used as excuse for accepting lower quality

termGroups.label: focus direction
termGroups.description: 指定审查重点会污染零上下文判断

termGroups.label: fix reference
termGroups.description: 提及修复会让审查变成确认修复，而不是独立评估当前状态

termGroups.label: known issue
termGroups.description: 提及已知问题会引导审查者验证特定问题

termGroups.label: expected outcome
termGroups.description: 提及预期结果会引导审查者确认预测

termGroups.label: previous finding
termGroups.description: 提及上轮发现会引导审查者确认过去结论

termGroups.label: verification direction
termGroups.description: 指定验证内容会污染零上下文判断

termGroups.label: previous reference
termGroups.description: 提及之前情况会引导审查者做对比判断

termGroups.label: authority reference
termGroups.description: 权威背书会制造通过压力

termGroups.label: approval reference
termGroups.description: 批准引用会制造通过压力

termGroups.label: baseline anchoring
termGroups.description: 基线指标会锚定审查者接受现有水平

termGroups.label: negative direction
termGroups.description: 负向指导会隐式引导审查者注意力
